Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx basic,$0801,$ffff "EXOLON-080D" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Exolon.prg"
Metadata.Notes:
Patched $3935 from $00 to $02 so that the controls default to joystick in port 2.
Note: as the Rack-It release containing the loading screen by Stephen Robertson (SIR) could not be located, the image was converted back from the image hosted on Lemon64!
